notes: Late public polls exist but disagree materially.
Official live-results page was checked pre-close; no vote totals are used in forecast.
Markets are included with caps, normalization, and settlement/liquidity checks.
Aggregator averages are used once and visible components are retained as deduplication evidence.
Extraordinary spending is capped because late polls already reflect much of it.
Formal endorsements, surrogates, and issue-group recommendations are tracked separately from the narrower modeled event file.
Age crosstabs explain turnout risk; they are not double-counted as independent topline polls.
Historical Massie vote history shows incumbent baseline strength, but prior cycles are not directly weighted into this unusual 2026 primary.
Official KY-04 registration snapshots are used to frame contested-primary turnout range and electorate composition, not as a separate weighted forecast component.
Ensemble uses more signals, but conflict penalties keep uncertainty wide.
